description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that installs the nightly Rust toolchain via a before_script using curl to fetch rustup.sh and runs it with --channel=nightly --disable-sudo --yes. Define three stages: test, bench, and deploy. Add a test_job in the test stage that executes cargo test --features=\"random\". Add a bench_job in the bench stage that runs cargo bench --features=\"random\". Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs cargo doc, moves the generated documentation from target/doc to a public directory, publishes the public/ folder as a Pages artifact, and restricts the job to the master branch.
